# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 731. Assembled Vehicles
##### § 731.003 — Conflict of Law

To the extent of a conflict between this chapter, including a rule adopted under this chapter, and another law, this chapter controls.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1079 (H.B.1755), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: To the extent of a conflict between this chapter, including a rule adopted under this chapter, and another law, this chapter controls.
